findings.title: Pipeline hardcodes extractor/parser implementations
findings.description: TradelineExtractionPipeline instantiates concrete extractor/parser/storage classes directly, which makes swapping strategies or testing alternative parsers harder.
findings.recommendation: Introduce dependency injection or factory-based initialization so different extractors/parsers can be configured without editing the pipeline class.
findings.impact: Potential degradation of reliability or security posture if left unaddressed.
